programme.desc: The world is astounded when a reclusive candy manufacturer randomly places golden tickets inside chocolate bar wrappers, which will allow five lucky people to tour his unusual factory.

programme.title: Decorating Disney: Halloween Magic
programme.desc: A spooky behind the scenes tour on how Halloween 'spirits' spread throughout the Disney parks; learn how the dedicated team of Disney cast members bring Halloween to life.

programme.title: Movie: Casper
programme.desc: A paranormal expert and his daughter move into a house that is inhabited by four ghosts.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: A former CIA assassin from an experimental top-secret program resorts to his training when he is framed for a botched CIA operation.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: As government agents continue to track him down, Jason Bourne searches for his identity by going back to where his journey all began.

programme.title: Movie: The Accountant
programme.desc: Christian Wolff is a math savant that becomes a freelance accountant for crime organizations. To appear legitimate, he takes on a legal client, a robotics company. He helps a young accountant clerk investigate a discrepancy, which places them in danger.

programme.title: Movie: The Commuter
programme.desc: While riding the train home, a businessman is approached by a stranger looking for his help. Without knowing it, he becomes caught up in a criminal conspiracy that puts not only his own life on the line, but that of everyone riding the train.

programme.title: Movie: Unknown
programme.desc: After awakening from a coma, a man discovers that his identity has been stolen.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Touched by the Sun
programme.desc: When a female combat pilot and navy hero dies in an air-show plane crash, the team must investigate if it's the fault of the pilot or the new jet that was just approved to deploy to bases globally.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: I Do

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Foreign Affairs

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Insane in the Membrane
programme.desc: The team's participation in the annual Red Dress Run is cut short when a Petty Officer is found dead in the French Quarter from a drug overdose.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Broken Hearted
programme.desc: The life of a genius navy coder employed by Brody's mother, Olivia, hangs in the balance after the heart intended for his transplant is stolen. Olivia joins the team as they race to locate the missing organ.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Confluence
programme.desc: Special Agent Pride and Sonja are ambushed and on the run after traveling to Texas to escort a key witness for the trial of an infamous arms dealer that Pride apprehended.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: During a city-wide blackout that impedes law enforcement and emergency response teams, Pride vows to solve the murder of a family friend's fiancé.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Billy and the Kid
programme.desc: The murder of a marine provides new clues in the first case Pride and Lasalle ever worked together, just before Hurricane Katrina struck the city and washed away any evidence. Also, the team celebrates Thanksgiving together in Pride's bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Blue Christmas
programme.desc: A string of Christmas burglaries turns deadly and the evidence leads the team to Wade's adopted son, Danny. Also, Lasalle and Brody tease Sonja about the high stakes of drawing Pride in the team's secret Santa holiday exchange.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sister City
programme.desc: While Pride and the New Orleans team investigate a Russian sleeper agent who was involved with Abby's brother, Sebastian flies to D.C. to partner with Abby on the forensics in the case. Bishop drives through the night to deliver a package to New Orleans.

programme.title: Movie: Heaven Is for Real

programme.title: Movie: Max

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Morning Star

programme.title: The Walking Dead: What We Become

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Look At the Flowers

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Too Far Gone

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Pop Goes the Easel
programme.desc: The boys duck police in an art school.

programme.title: Movie: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: A juvenile burglar breaks into a house, only to discover the owners' horrific secrets.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween 5: The Revenge of Michael Myers
programme.desc: One year after being shot, Michael Myers awakens from a coma and sets out to find his traumatized niece, Jamie, who is in a hospital. Unbeknownst to him, Jamie has developed a telepathic link to him, which she plans to use to defeat him.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers

programme.title: Movie: Independence Day
programme.desc: When an alien species attacks the human race by destroying New York City, Los Angeles and Washington, the survivors, lead by the President of the United States, a scientist and an Air Force pilot, attempt to thwart future attacks on Earth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming

programme.desc: Dorothy resists pressure to pass a failing student-athlete and Rose accuses her dentist.

programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: Movie: Little Fockers

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure

programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The O.J. Simpson Case: Other Killer Theories
programme.desc: New theories emerge in the O.J. Simpson case, including a serial killer's confession and a possible hit man who claims responsibility for the murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tar Rigger
programme.desc: Mike heads to San Diego to get dirty with the tar rigging crew of the Star of India, the oldest active merchant ship in the world. Then, Mike takes a look back at some of the dirty tools he's used that make civilized life possible for the rest of us.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dirty Chip Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads to the Dirty Potato Chips factory and learns how potato chips are made and what it takes to keep the machines used to make them clean and in working order. Then it's off to Rifle, CO where Mike attempts to clean a "monster" hidden underground.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sheep Castrator
programme.desc: Mike works at an automobile dealership where the job is sawing down a giant concrete wall to make room for a new washbay, then heads to a sheep farm where he tries his hand at sheep shearing & castrating before getting treated to Rocky Mountain Oysters.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leech Trapper
programme.desc: Mike teams up with the boys from Bartos Bait & Fish to catch leeches that will later be sold for fish bait; then it's off to the Green Tripe factory in Hollister, CA where Mike helps make BARF (Biologically Appropriate Raw Food) for dogs.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mannequin Factory
programme.desc: Mike finds himself at the Windsorland Mobile Home Park where homes are being broken down to make room for a new shopping center, and then he heads off to Patina-V where he learns that making mannequins is not only a dirty job, but a form of art as well.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Egg Farm
programme.desc: Mike visits a Chicken Farm to see how eggs make it to the store. There, he finds out that 1.4 million chickens equal a lot of poo, which he gets the chance to clean. Later, Mike learns how dirty dirt becomes clean dirt as he sterilizes soil in Oklahoma.

programme.title: I Quit: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: While all of the businesses faced challenges, three of them have impressed the mentors with their perseverance and passion. The entrepreneurs are invited to New York for one more mentoring session, unaware that one of them will walk away with $100,000.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Avian Vomitologist
programme.desc: Travelling the country, Mike lends a helping hand at the Colorado marble quarry before collecting owl vomit. Mike later learns how to palpitate a cow to check for pregnancy.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Turkey Farmer
programme.desc: Mike examines the short lives of turkeys as they make their way from farm to sandwich. Then, it's off to a potato farm, where Mike digs in the dirt for colourful taters that will revolutionize fries. He removes sewage from a water treatment plant as well.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Alligator Farmer
programme.desc: Mike finds himself in another one of the world's dirtiest places on earth when he visits a sugar mill. Later Mike will tackle fire overhauling with the finest firefighters before visiting a menacing alligator farm.

programme.title: I Quit: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: While all of the businesses faced challenges, three of them have impressed the mentors with their perseverance and passion. The entrepreneurs are invited to New York for one more mentoring session, unaware that one of them will walk away with $100,000.

programme.title: I Quit: Partners in Conflict
programme.desc: Alex and Sibrena's meeting with their mentor comes to an explosive climax. Esrever's trip to a wine festival takes a shocking turn. Matteo's wife Julie proves to be a valuable asset, but making her a partner in Versattire is easier said than done.

programme.title: I Quit: Uncertain Futures
programme.desc: Mentor Tricia Clarke-Stone visits Ashanti, Tyshemia and Jasmine once more to find out if their Esrever wine business has a future. Meanwhile, Versattire's Matteo and Julie fly to Paris Fashion Week, and Blue Coolers' Marcus and Chris hit the road.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Wild Alaska Cruises - Mark Few
programme.desc: We go fishing in Alaska with basketball coach Mark Few.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today
programme.desc: A look at the visionaries bringing inspiration, creation and growth to tomorrow's world.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: Bass Pro Tour: 2020 Stage Five Championship Round - Sturgeon Bay
programme.desc: The Stage Five Championship Round of Bass Pro Tour, from Sturgeon Bay Wisconsin.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Josh travels to the remote and landmine-riddled jungles of Cambodia to investigate the lost city of the Khmer Empire and search for a mystical relic that over 1,000 years ago gave its God King the power to incinerate his enemies.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Morgan's Lost Gold
programme.desc: Josh dives into the Lajas Reef off Panama's coast in search for treasure chests on the sunken flagship of legendary pirate Captain Morgan. His journey takes him to Panama City and he visits the Panama Canal, a modern marvel.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus: Legend or Liar?
programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Sunstone
programme.desc: Josh heads to the U.K. and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the sea. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1,000 feet into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: City of Gold
programme.desc: Josh treks the stone-paved Inca Trail, ascending 20,000 feet through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of the undiscovered City of Gold. His road to riches takes a detour to the legendary ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of the Nazca
programme.desc: Josh flies to Peru to investigate the giant geoglyphs drawn into earth by ancient Nazca tribes. By studying newly found lines and joining a Nazca psychedelic ritual, Josh uncovers the true meaning behind the mysterious tracings.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Radioactive Rocks
programme.desc: A dialysis patient is bleeding and doctors can't get it to stop. A naked man falls into a cactus and is covered head to toe in needles. A patient brings radioactive rocks to the hospital causing chaos in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dumpster Smash
programme.desc: A man smashed by a dumpster clings to life; an elderly nun and a drunken prostitute are in the ER at the same time; a woman suffering an apparent stroke may have a deadly rare virus, but her medical intern son doesn't agree with the doctor's suspicions.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: A man has a snapping turtle clamped to his neck, and it will not let go. As a hurricane closes in, an ER doctor rushes to get all the patients out. A man is impaled by a chainsaw while trimming trees twenty feet high.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Drama Mama
programme.desc: The real reason behind a teenager's bulging tummy and stomach pains shocks nurses, doctors and even her meddling mom. A delirious man yelling for his 'car' reveals clues about his own attempted murder, and a college co-ed mysteriously stops breathing.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: An off-duty ER physician diagnoses his own critical illness en route to the hospital. A visiting ER doctor is threatened while working at a remote hospital. A patient with ominous symptoms returns to the ER multiple times after a trip.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Plastered!
programme.desc: A college student comes in with a plaster mask on her face. A patient's heart stops and restarts on its own, confusing doctors. Two teenagers who came separately have similar symptoms.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rattled
programme.desc: A snake bite victim may die in the ER when life-saving anti-venom isn't available; a mother is near death after having a C-section and doctors are torn over treatment options.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: My Big Fat Ethiopian Wedding

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: I'll Just Call Myself The Original Diva
programme.desc: According to bride Sarah's mom, they already found the perfect dress, but Sarah isn't convinced. Monte tries to find a dress they both love. Bride Comfort loves bling but her mom doesn't. Lori tries to fit both of their styles.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Trio of Options
programme.desc: Bride Katy brought along her stylish Aunt Kristin to shop. Bride Genine falls in love with a dress but her sort-of-psychic friend isn't sure. Meanwhile Monte helps bride Gretchen tailor her dress to perfection.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: What Would Phaedra Do?
programme.desc: Bride Nikki gets a big surprise when her favourite celebrity idol shows up to help her choose the wedding gown of her dreams. Meanwhile, bride Melody is ready to see her custom jet-black gown, but her mom may not approve of this non-traditional choice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Multiple Dress Personality Disorder
programme.desc: WNBA star and bride Angel has a game plan to say yes to a pantsuit, but her friend thinks she should sport a dress. Bride Angel's fiancée, Brande, isn't sure about the kind of dress she wants. Meanwhile, bride Cassie is on the hunt for the perfect veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Two Montes are Better Than None
programme.desc: Bride Katherine wants a vintage dress she can wear with cowboy boots, but her BFF is pushing for a glamorous Parisian-inspired gown. Bride Dawn's son is a mini-fashionista who gives Monte a run for his money as he seeks out the perfect dress for his mom.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: I Feel Fierce
programme.desc: Bride Jaye is eager to try on wedding gowns for her big day, but is shocked to find her sister has taken her place on the runway. Bride Allysa searches for a truly unique dress to complement her medieval-themed wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Little Sparkle Goes a Long Way
programme.desc: YouTube sensation and bride BFFTaylor won't feel satisfied with her dress until her mom cries. Olympian bride Kellie Wells comes in tow with Team Conservative and Team Sexy, and she must please them both or risk leaving empty-handed.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Are You Ready to Play Bridal Blitz?

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Rockabilly and Motorcycles

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Waiting for a Sign

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: 88 and Out at the Gate

programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Trust Me as Someone Who Has One!
programme.desc: Horse the squirrel meets a cataclysmic end. The Tenderloins renew their long standing cat vs dog fight, and one contestant makes waves by revealing who is 'statistically the best.'

programme.title: The Misery Index: No One Told Sal
programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: It's Damien's House
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer has a surefire sexy way to get out of picking up the check, Julian McCullough takes a lot of heat for his 'drug dealer' shirt, and Tone Bell has harsh words for karaoke goers.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: We're Going Hard Tonight
programme.desc: Paul Virzi proves he's your kids worst camp counselor, Gina Yashere defends women in fedoras, and Josh Wolf risks beheading if he ever travels back to England.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout
programme.desc: Three comics enter into a battle of high stakes comedic one-upmanship.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: This is My Art, Dad!
programme.desc: Dulce Sloan illustrates the benefits of twerking at zero gravity, Dave Hill becomes the number one all-time CKO crowd high-fiver, and Casey James Salengo says he'll get even with both of them.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Fighting Back the Tears
programme.desc: Gym-loving ladies power through the pain while bartending besties try to knock back the heat. The fight for $25,000 is not easy. Friendships will strain, people will cry, and stomachs will be destroyed in the pepperdome.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Chris Webber vs. Bo the Fan
programme.desc: Broadcasting legend Rich Eisen shows one fan there's no such thing as a free lunch, an interactive video game gets a little too realistic, and Chris Webber teams up with former teammate Lou Williams to get things popping.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Candace Parker vs. Delmy the Fan
programme.desc: Wrestling legend Bill Goldberg shows how shooting a commercial is backbreaking work, and football star Travis Kelce is back to test some products. Plus, one fan can't look up to WNBA superstar Candace Parker anymore.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Himself
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam battles with his inner self-doubt over how biases affect the show. He then explores the shortcomings of storytelling and the influence (or lack thereof) of advertising on the integrity of the series.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Supercuts
programme.desc: Find out which entrepreneur sparked a Jokers fashion debate, when Joe first starting 'nosing' people and which challenge was originally filmed for the pilot episode.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Inventions 8
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Inventions 11
programme.desc: Twenty more inventions including a way to make pooping in the woods even more exciting, a way to cool your man parts for optimal baby making, and a sound system for the great beyond.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 12
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the smartest inventions ever to hit the market. There's a flask for your butt, a way to re-shape meat, and the last doughnut security system you'll ever need.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 13
programme.desc: These inventions could put Thomas Edison to shame, from a bird feeder with a shocking high-voltage surprise, to a bowl made entirely of bacon and a wacky way to grow bananas at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: The guys pair up to share educational ideas with perplexed parents, then teach Krav Maga to martial arts newbies. When one joker refuses, he becomes the big loser, and faces an opponent that scares the pants off him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.desc: Giada spends several days working in the restaurants of celebrated master Chef Fabio Picchi, where she shares knowledge and, in turn, learns the art of Florentine cuisine.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Keeping It Breezy
programme.desc: Inspired by his childhood summer days at the Jersey Shore, Bobby Flay and Beach Bites host Katie Lee throw a breezy brunch for their guests.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Pork
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing new ways to cook with pork, and she's putting bacon, sausage, kielbasa and tenderloins in the spotlight.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Twin City Treats
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli brings a taste of home to her friend, Minnesota native Melissa Peterman, tempting her with the best Midwest bounty.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Tailgate Get-Togethers
programme.desc: Ree shares a lineup of tailgate-friendly favourites including Italian pork sandwiches and butternut squash and black bean enchiladas. There are also easy slow-cooker teriyaki ribs and a Greek seven-layer dip that's perfect for fall.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast Hacks
programme.desc: Ree is testing delicious ideas for kitchen hacks to up her breakfast game. There's a shortcut to the divine with chocolate chip hazelnut pancakes, and she's going experimental with a crazy omelet in a bag.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Faq Freezer
programme.desc: It's a Pioneer freezer FAQ, with answers starring one dough, two cookies to create both chocolate chip and cherry and lime treats. There's a fantastic freezer-friendly butternut squash soup, plus spicy chicken spaghetti and a roasted tomatillo sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Alex's Care Pack
programme.desc: Ree Drummond sends a care package to her daughter Alex in college. Packed alongside ranch photos for a homesick cure are brownie cookies, homemade cheddar crackers, spicy party mix and crazy chocolate bark.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Harvest Pre-Haul
programme.desc: It's beet harvest pre-haul time, and Molly Yeh is making the coziest foods imaginable to keep her husband, Nick, primed for the work ahead. She whips up her tender spiced beef hotdish with bacon jalapeno cornbread, loaded potato skins.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Around the World
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood showcases her flair for cooking international dishes like Mediterranean stuffed collard greens, her version of Greek stuffed grape leaves. She also makes French beef bourguignon and chicken fettuccine alfredo with her husband Garth Brooks.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Simple Speedy Dishes
programme.desc: The Kitchen shares their favourite recipes that are fast and flavourful. Katie Lee begins with a quick, easy way to make a classic with her grilled chicken parmesan and Alex Guarnaschelli shares a simple pork, tofu and vegetable stir fry.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Our Best Big Batch Recipes
programme.desc: The Kitchen is making big batch recipes that are perfect for meal prep or family dinners. Jeff Mauro starts with his escarole, sausage, peppers and beans cheat sheet on the grill. Then, Geoffrey Zakarian makes a big batch of his Ratatouille.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins: Trick-or-treating Nightmare
programme.desc: Six expert pumpkin carvers tackle 3-D sculpting challenges, starting with science experiments gone wrong in the Quick Carve round. Things heat up in the Big Carve round when the competitors incorporate fire in 3-D dioramas of trick-or-treating pumpkins.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Monster Support Group
programme.desc: The four remaining teams are challenged to create astonishing and delectable Halloween-themed displays showing that even the scariest monsters need friends, too. Actress Katie Sarife joins the judges to pick the winning team.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Super Stocked: An Offal Halloween
programme.desc: In a spook-tacular Halloween cook-off our chefs start out with some pumpkin bowling to determine the frightening ingredients in their daring dish. Next, competitors rummage through some creepy clearance carts to find ingredients to make a dish.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Another Night With Neil Diamond

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Bodacious Vidalia
programme.desc: When Walden encourages a depressed Alan to update his look and start dating again, Alan faces a moral dilemma when he attracts a married woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cows, Prepare to Be Tipped
programme.desc: Walden dates a hot 22-year-old but finds himself more interested in her grandmother. Meanwhile, Alan and Jake go on a father-son bonding trip.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nangnangnangnang
programme.desc: Alan is shocked when Charlie's 25-year-old daughter shows up at Walden's beach house to connect with what's left of her family and who happens to like everything her dad liked, including women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Think I Banged Lucille Ball
programme.desc: When Walden feels cramped in his own house, Jenny moves in with Evelyn and her boyfriend, Marty. Meanwhile, Alan becomes Lyndsey's 'other man.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: This Unblessed Biscuit
programme.desc: Walden and Alan think it may be time for Berta to retire when she injures her back at work.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Clank, Clank, Drunken Skank
programme.desc: Walden starts partying with Jenny and her hot friends. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey’s illicit affair is jeopardized.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. Walden, He Die. I Clean Room
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey's illicit affair puts Walden in danger, forcing him to accept Rose's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Numero Uno Accidente Lawyer
programme.desc: Walden's date with an accident-prone model goes longer than expected. Meanwhile, Alan dates a woman who shares some surprising personal information with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: On Vodka, on Soda, on Blender, on Mixer!
programme.desc: Walden helps Jenny get a second date with a one-night stand. Alan receives a Japanese delicacy from Jake for Christmas, and Walden's Malibu house is alive with questionable Christmas carol lyrics.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Pilot
programme.desc: Christine's 8-year-old son, Ritchie has been accepted into a posh private school where Christine encounters two snooty class moms, Marly and Lindsay, who seem unable to grasp the concept that Christine actually works.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Supertramp
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richard and new Christine are enjoying an intimate relationship, she becomes determined to make her own conquests. After several failed attempts to meet eligible men, she finally runs into a guy named Stan at the grocery store.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water
programme.desc: When Christine learns that her close friends, Barb and Pete, are responsible for introducing Richard to his new girlfriend named Christine, she allows them to set her up on a blind date of her own. Meanwhile, Matthew takes Ritchie to swimming lessons.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: One Toe Over the Line, Sweet Jesus
programme.desc: Richard plays the part of the jealous ex-husband when he learns that Christine is enjoying her fifth date with a new beau, Burton. He even goes as far as to sabotage the happy couple's goodnight kiss and intentionally insults Burton.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I'll Show You Mine
programme.desc: After 10 dates, Christine faces a critical moment in her relationship with Burton. Will she or won't she? Let him in the house, that is, to meet her son, Ritchie. She eventually relents, only to be thrown for a loop later.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Other F Word
programme.desc: Christine's attempt to promote racial and ethnic diversity at Ritchie's exclusive private school has unintended consequences.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Long Day Journey Into Stan
programme.desc: Following Christine's break-up with Burton, everyone expects her to fall apart emotionally but she insists she is fine and looking forward to spending time alone. But after being humiliated in a restaurant she realizes that she really did care for him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Teach Your Children Well
programme.desc: Christine feels pressured to throw an extravagant party for Ritchie's birthday, his first involving kids from his new school. Recoiling from sticker shock after meeting with an event planner, Christine decides to have an arts and crafts party at home.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Ritchie Has Two Mommies
programme.desc: Christine tries not to have a meltdown when her ex-husband, Richard, brings his 'new' Christine with him to pick up Ritchie and take him to breakfast so that they can get to know one another.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: No Fault Divorce
programme.desc: Christine's former marriage counsellor comes into the gym, leading to some awkwardness between the women. When Christine mentions this to Richard, his cryptic reaction leads her to wonder if it was in the counsellor's interest to encourage their divorce.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Exile on Lame Street
programme.desc: Fearing that Ritchie is too young to be exposed to sex, drugs and rock and roll vices on display at a Rolling Stones concert, Christine initially forbids it. Eventually, she relents but immediately regrets and in a panic, goes to the venue to keep tabs.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Engagement
programme.desc: Blanche announces that Harry has proposed leaving Rose worried about where she will live.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Guess Who's Coming to the Wedding?
programme.desc: Dorothy invites her ex-husband Stan to their daughter's wedding so she can get revenge.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose the Prude
programme.desc: Rose has qualms about sharing her stateroom on an upcoming cruise with a man she likes.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle
programme.desc: A doctor Dorothy dates also gets Blanche's pulse racing, until he makes a pass at her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition

programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.desc: Rose is touting the power of positive thinking; Blanche's beau has a heart attack.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Close to Home
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a remote town in Colorado overwhelmed by feral cats. A staff member's beloved dog needs emergency surgery. Dr. Baier gives some injured birds of prey a second chance. And, Jeff races to save the life of a family's precious Chihuahua.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: At Home With Wolves
programme.desc: A young girl hopes that Dr. Jeff can save her puppy from a deadly virus. The team treats a stray cat with a life-threatening injury. And Dr. Jeff must gain the trust of rescued wolves to help an ailing member of the pack.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Brave Little Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a dog with a mysterious injury. Dr. Petra helps vet tech Jess' Dalmatian after it eats something toxic. A neglected turtle needs a new home, and the team falls in love with a litter of stray kittens.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A First for Dr. Jeff
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff performs a surgery he'd never done before on a dog with labored breathing. A senior canine was abandoned by his owner and the staff must find him a new forever home, while neglected ornate box turtles are saved by Dr. Baier.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The New Challenge
programme.desc: As a new normal emerges, Dr. Jeff and the Planet Pethood Plus family must rally together to ensure proper care for their animals. With no time to spare, the staff must spring into action when a dog is hit by a car, and a cat suffers from a risky bleed.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Miska's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Vet Leanne races to rescue critically injured koalas from Australia's blazing bushfires. A two-tonne rhino calf named Kipenzi wreaks havoc in the zoo trucks, and the carnivore team eagerly awaits to see if snow leopard Miska reveals an exciting secret.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Wishing for a Meerkat Miracle
programme.desc: At the zoo, a recent fire is suspected to be what's keeping Chester's hornbills from having chicks and a meerkat called Huskie has baby blues. Meanwhile, a sun bear called Millie has a feisty cub on her paws.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The New Challenge
programme.desc: As a new normal emerges, Dr. Jeff and the Planet Pethood Plus family must rally together to ensure proper care for their animals. With no time to spare, the staff must spring into action when a dog is hit by a car, and a cat suffers from a risky bleed.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Nine Lives
programme.desc: When a beloved dog is hit by a car, Dr. Jeff battles to save his shattered leg. Then, Dr. Amy takes on a new challenge treating seven bad-tempered chickens, and a tiny kitten found unconscious at a construction site unites everyone in a fight to save it.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Miska's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Vet Leanne races to rescue critically injured koalas from Australia's blazing bushfires. A two-tonne rhino calf named Kipenzi wreaks havoc in the zoo trucks, and the carnivore team eagerly awaits to see if snow leopard Miska reveals an exciting secret.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Disappearance of the Warty Pig
programme.desc: Visayan warty pig Wendy is fed up with the attentions of male pig Jake and decides to escape. She can't be found overnight, despite a major search by the keepers.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: One More Chance
programme.desc: Jeff is faced with saving a dog that goes into cardiac arrest shortly after arriving at his clinic.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Rocks and Crocs
programme.desc: A dog is brought into the clinic with a suspected broken leg, but Dr. Jeff quickly diagnosis a far more serious condition requiring urgent surgery. Vet tech Tasha is forced to overcome her childhood fear of birds. And, a cat's appetite gets it in trouble.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Drug Run River
programme.desc: Game wardens Gould and Hickerson chase drug smugglers that crossed the Rio Grande River. Game warden Boone checks out an injured bird. Game warden Damron relocates a feisty marsupial and her babies. Amundson and Poole meet a fan.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lying Dogs
programme.desc: The Game Wardens patrol the beach, lake and land, as summer is in full swing. Wardens educate a dog owner about leaving pets in the sun. An under-age drinker tells too many lies. Wardens inspect novice jet skiers on a busy recreational lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers
programme.desc: Game Warden McGee rushes to a domestic altercation. Game Wardens Zuniga and Roel run into trespassers, while Provasnik inspects a potentially stolen jet ski. Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up on an investigation, and a baby squirrel is rescued.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A tense confrontation ensues when Wardens Scott and Gould respond to a call about an illegal deer hunting case. A pair of raccoons find their way to a gas station and must be trapped, and Warden Boone handles a disgruntled hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Reckless Behavior
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property. Then, stray bullets are shot into a horse owner's home, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Witness Protection

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: The War of Real Estate
programme.desc: Newly single Josh Flagg plays mentor to a teenage buyer with an eight million dollar budget for an after-school creative haven. Meanwhile, Josh Altman's domination continues while British besties David and James chase a $45 million estate in Holmby Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Bye, Felicia
programme.desc: Old rivalries rear their ugly head when Josh Flagg's teenage client falls for Josh Altman's multi-million-dollar listing in the Bird Streets, leading to the agents facing off at the negotiating table for the first time ever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Fuschia My Life!
programme.desc: Josh Altman lists a stunning modern home with a $2-million closet, but is left hung out to dry when his client refuses every offer. Josh Flagg takes an Internet mogul shopping for a fixer to flip into a multi-million-dollar masterpiece.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Back on Market
programme.desc: The gloves come off when Madison's easy beachfront sale is jeopardized by his client working with another agent. Meanwhile, Josh Flagg lands a historical party pad, and Josh Altman juggles two Santa Monica listings and struggles to keep them straight.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Montcalm and Carry On
programme.desc: Josh Altman is caught between his fiancée and his client in a deal that could result in triple commission. Josh Flagg refuses to give up as he struggles to attract a buyer for his historic hilltop listings. The Brits' partnership begins to unravel.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: White Wedding Day
programme.desc: Josh and Heather prepare to say their vows in Aspen, but first face off in a tough negotiation that could keep them from walking down the aisle. Josh Flagg lists a coveted lot in the Beverly Hills flats, but his strategy backfires.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Zeppo Marx the Spot
programme.desc: Josh Flagg lists a mid-century modern home built by Zeppo Marx, and must fight off developers looking to bulldoze the iconic structure. Newlyweds Josh and Heather return home from their wedding and are up against a ticking clock to find their dream house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Nightmare on Altman Street
programme.desc: David and James throw a massive party as a last ditch effort to sell their St. Ives listing, but find that agents are just looking to take advantage of their client’s financial situation.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Turn and Burn
programme.desc: Josh Altman battles his own client over a $20 million listing price for a sexy Sunset Strip bachelor pad. Josh Flagg makes a big decision that his friends and family find shocking. Madison hustles to help a client downsize to a new Westside home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Surf vs. Turf
programme.desc: Madison goes up against David and James for a modern Malibu compound, but when the owner toys with the idea of teaming them all up, Madison doesn’t pull any punches to try and win the listing for himself.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Co-list From Hell
programme.desc: Josh Flagg whisks Bobby off to Paris to propose and worries his behaviour will blow the surprise. Meanwhile, Josh Altman takes on a listing with an unpredictable homeowner. Madison and the Brits continue to clash over their co-list and things get ugly.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Best and Final
programme.desc: Josh Flagg pops the question to his beau in true style. James and David take on a home that's been on the market for over 800 days with no buyer in sight. Madison tries to close a deal with a client who fired him in order to land a dream listing.

programme.desc: In the year 1980, Homer is working at the local mini golf course and dating Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's First Word
programme.desc: Flashbacks reveal that Lisa's first word was 'Bart,' which always secretly broke Homer's heart, who hoped her first word would be 'Daddy.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Barbershop Quartet
programme.desc: After the kids find an album cover with Homer's picture on it, Homer reveals that he used to perform in a barbershop quartet with Principal Skinner, Chief Wiggum and Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Kids Are All Fight
programme.desc: When Homer gets an old film roll developed, the family takes a trip down memory lane to see the origins of how Bart and Lisa first started fighting with each other.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa's Sax
programme.desc: Homer and Marge tell the story of how Lisa originally got her saxophone back in 1990. When a school counsellor notices Lisa is a child prodigy, Homer's inability to pay for a preschool leads him to purchase a saxophone for her instead.

programme.title: The Simpsons: And Maggie Makes Three
programme.desc: Homer tells the story about how he had to give up his dream job after Maggie was born.

programme.title: Nature's Great Events: The Great Salmon Run
programme.desc: A spectacular natural event takes place in North America every year as hundreds of millions of salmon return from the Pacific Ocean to the mountain streams where they were born. The salmon must overcome fierce torrents and leap over waterfalls.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As summer returns, a new challenge emerges: Yellowstone begins to dry out. Yellowstone cutthroat trout mass in shallow streams ready to spawn, but they make easy prey for otters and osprey.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Summer
programme.desc: The few short weeks of an Alaskan summer must sustain the abundant wildlife for the whole year. No season brings more surprises. There is a predictable wealth of riches, but there is so little time to master the art of survival.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As summer returns, a new challenge emerges: Yellowstone begins to dry out. Yellowstone cutthroat trout mass in shallow streams ready to spawn, but they make easy prey for otters and osprey.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: An Epic Journey
programme.desc: The very best highlights of the series, taking viewers on a spectacular journey through the entire polar year, from the depths of winter to the melting world of the polar summer.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Spring
programme.desc: Wildlife cameraman Gordon Buchanan travels to Norway's Svalbard archipelago, where he meets, tracks and hunkers down with a family of polar bears.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Summer
programme.desc: Gordon finds that things have not gotten easier for the polar bears when he returns to Svalbard in the summer.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Autumn
programme.desc: Lyra is struggling to care for her cub while fighting off starvation in Autumn.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Summer
programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter
programme.desc: There is no greater challenge for life than winter in the Polar Regions. As temperatures plummet to 70 degrees below zero Fahrenheit, witness the greatest test of survival on the planet.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie and Chris tackle the toughest off-road race on the planet: the brutal Baja 1000. Out on track, there’s a showdown between a Renault hot hatch, a Porsche sports car... and an old Lamborghini. Laurence and Emilia Fox are studio guests.

programme.title: Movie: Casino
programme.desc: The rise and fall of ill-fated mobsters in a Las Vegas casino during the 1970s.

programme.title: Movie: Scarface
programme.desc: A Cuban refugee makes his way to the top of the Florida drug trade. Money and power make him feel like he's living the American dream. Despite his success, his position is tenuous and he is constantly watching those around him for treachery.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Sili-Coke Valley
programme.desc: Silicon Valley's secret drug life revealed: cocaine is the drug of choice.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: New Year's High
programme.desc: The countdown to New Year’s Eve in New York City has begun. With the biggest party of the year rapidly approaching, drug gangs go into overdrive to capitalize on the enormous demand.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: California Coke Wars
programme.desc: A Los Angeles drug dealer sells cocaine destined for celebrities, and a Peruvian farmer feeds his family selling coca leaves to the cartels.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Jamaica Buzz
programme.desc: Kingston, Jamaica, is in the hands of highly organized and warring drug gangs who manage drug trafficking and distribution at all levels.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: High Behind Bars
programme.desc: Inmates still find ways to get drugs inside jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Danger Island
programme.desc: Puerto Rico is now a major gateway for cocaine to pass through to the US and its residents are experiencing a wave of violence, and its streets are in the grip of a drug epidemic.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: London Falling
programme.desc: Cocaine and marijuana dominate a drug fueled 24-hour lifestyle for Londoners, who work hard and play even harder.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: High Behind Bars
programme.desc: Inmates still find ways to get drugs inside jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Jamaica Buzz
programme.desc: Kingston, Jamaica, is in the hands of highly organized and warring drug gangs who manage drug trafficking and distribution at all levels.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: Kingdom of the Kims
programme.desc: For decades, Korea and its people labour under Japanese imperialist rule. In 1912, in a small town outside Pyongyang, a child is born - Kim Il Sung, coinciding with an omen of imperialism's doom.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: The Son of God
programme.desc: Unpacking the unique Kim father-son relationship further, 'Son of God' tracks the decline of Kim Il Sung and the rise of his son, Kim Jong Il.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: Nuclear Family
programme.desc: 'A Nuclear Family' begins as the Cold War ends — and North Korea has lost Soviet patronage, and with it, the security it guarantees and the economic support that has sustained the country for nearly half a century.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: Rocket Man
programme.desc: With the death of Kim Jong Il and the rise of the new leader of North Korea — his son, Kim Jong Un, taking power at the age of 28.

programme.title: Hitler Youth: The Nazi Child Army
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, the Nazi Party created the Hitler Youth to indoctrinate children and adolescents with Nazi ideology and prepare them to become a child army for Hitler.

programme.title: Hitler Youth: Child Army's Last Stand
programme.desc: Emerging in the 1920s, the hitlerjugen, the youth movement of the Nazi Party served Hitler fanatically. Hundreds of these young soldiers will be captured by the allies and sent into camps to be denazified.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Attack on America
programme.desc: Scientists search the ocean for a shipwreck connected to Hitler. The U.S. government hid it after Hitler's Navy dropped a deadly assault on American ships on December 19, 1941.

programme.title: Nazi Underworld
programme.desc: Dig deeper into Adolf Hitler's inner circle to discover this dictator's identity beyond what is found in history books. Follow a list of characters that spans the full spectrum of German society.

programme.title: After Hitler: Part One
programme.desc: WWII in Europe is over, but the brutality continues for many, after Hitler.

programme.title: After Hitler: Part Two
programme.desc: From the Nuremberg Trials and the division of Germany to the founding of the United Nations, hear about the earth-shattering events that followed the end of World War II.

programme.title: When Nature Calls: Between a Rock and a Raccoon
programme.desc: Venomous rattlesnakes, unruly raccoons, and pack rats are on the loose across America.

programme.title: When Nature Calls: Snake, Rattle and Roll
programme.desc: Wild hogs in Florida must be relocated before they wreak havoc on homeowners' properties.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Goats Gone Wild
programme.desc: Dr. Pol keeps busy as the unofficial vet for the town's county fair. The clinic helps Timmy, a goat with a blocked esophagus and Cooter, a hound dog with a bite from battling with another dog.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Caturday Night Fever
programme.desc: When the sun goes down, the vets spring into action to help any animal in need.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Round of A-Paws
programme.desc: The vets treat a range of K9 cases from lethargic puppies to a dog attacked by a bobcat.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Sand Wars
programme.desc: Discover the multitudes of bizarre creatures that make the sandy plains of the seabed their home.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Examine the paradox of whales, penguins, iguanas and dolphins that inherited a burdensome legacy from their land-dwelling ancestors: they must breathe in open air.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Predator's Paradise
programme.desc: Explore the living, breathing, colourful mountains of coral that shelter an extraordinarily diverse group of species of every colour, shape and behaviour.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Giants of the Deep
programme.desc: Discover the lives of some of the great predators that haunt the vast oceanic desert including blue whales and hordes of tuna.

programme.title: Monster Fish: River Jaws
programme.desc: Zeb travels to Australia to try and track down two of the country's river shark species, on the biggest and one the rarest.

programme.title: Monster Fish: River Wolf
programme.desc: Zeb is heading into the heart of Guyana in search of fish with a terrifying reputation: the wolf fish. This species is said to be a brutal hunter of animals and reportedly even humans.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Frankenfish
programme.desc: Zeb Hogan, an explorer and aquatic biologist, goes in search of monster snakehead in Thailand, their natural habitat, and Florida, where they have become aggressive invaders.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Vampire Fish
programme.desc: The Vampire fish, known locally as payara, can weigh up to 40 pounds, hunts like a great white shark, has terrifying 6-inch fangs, and Zeb really wants to find one.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Shark Eating Goliath
programme.desc: Zeb goes hunting in the Atlantic waters off the coast of Florida to find the Goliath Grouper and uncover the surprising truth about this gigantic fish's monstrous reputation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Island of Alien Ooze
programme.desc: Satellite images capture a volcanic island that suddenly appears in the Pacific Ocean, and when NASA scientists arrive to investigate, they are baffled to find its home to a primordial slime and zombie creatures with origins in outer space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Serengeti Alien
programme.desc: When a strange black blob is spotted moving across the Serengeti, leaving a trail of destruction behind, experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate why this eerie phenomenon looks like something found on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden City of Inca Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters have searched for a lost Incan city of untold wealth for a century, but new technology might finally locate its riches. A strange mountain in Egypt sparks an investigation into Cleopatra's gems and the tomb of Alexander the Great.

programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.desc: How headphones, reflector light bulbs and diving regulators are made.

programme.desc: Glass sculptures, racing pulley systems, inductors, and medicine balls.
