programme.title: How It's Made: Cotton, Rodeo Roping Chutes, Asian Noodles and Rotary Engines
programme.desc: Features cotton, rodeo roping chutes, Asian noodles and rotary engines.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Once an Animal
programme.desc: A cold case from Northern California heats up when Detective Molly Daul ties a brutal assault case she's working on to this twelve year old murder. And when this killer strikes in Portland, multiple homicide detectives team up to take him down.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Everybody's Daughter
programme.desc: When Kate Johnson is murdered in her dorm room, detectives are stumped why this innocent young woman was targeted. After taking 400 DNA samples and establishing a secret task force, detectives track down Kate's killer and get their chilling answer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Beautiful Northwestern Airlines flight attendant Nancy Ludwig is discovered dead in her hotel room, her body mutilated and head almost decapitated. It will take the discovery of links to another heinous killing to blow the case wide open.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Vanishing Teens
programme.desc: In the fall of 1991, rural Michigan is plunged into paranoia and fear when four local teenage girls vanish without a trace. The community is in lockdown as residents face up to the very real possibility that a predator walks among them.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 1: Missing
programme.desc: In October 1989, 10 year-old-Amy Mihaljevic is lured to a suburban Ohio shopping mall by an unknown man and is never seen again. A 30 year mystery and nationwide manhunt ensues, thousands of leads, hundreds of suspects, one killer still at large.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains at large. A cavalcade of suspects emerges, each more compelling than the last. Investigators explore each one. Then, 106 days after Amy was taken, a gruesome discovery some 50 miles away from her Bay Village home: a body.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 3: New Evidence
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains on the loose and the case goes nationwide. Margaret appears on Oprah, anniversaries come and go, and then, finally, a confession. A man stands up in church in a neighboring town and declares: 'I killed Amy Mihaljevic.'

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Beautiful Northwestern Airlines flight attendant Nancy Ludwig is discovered dead in her hotel room, her body mutilated and head almost decapitated. It will take the discovery of links to another heinous killing to blow the case wide open.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: After they fail to turn up for an annual maple tapping celebration, Ian and Nancy Blackburn's lifeless bodies are discovered stuff into the trunk of their own car. The whirlwind investigation will unmask a monster who hid in plain sight.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Trail of Frozen Tears
programme.desc: Pretty pre-teen Rosie Davenport is found brutally murdered in an abandoned house, the circumstances of her death eerily similar to the unsolved murder of 13-year-old Malissa Thomas one year earlier.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Night Shift Nightmare
programme.desc: The naked body of 19-year-old Wanda Musk is found just miles from where she worked at local gas station. In the wake of the vicious killing, suspicions mount over several young men in the community including her ex-boyfriend and a troubled local teen.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Case of 'Affluenza'
programme.desc: A privileged 16 year old with a troubled past, killed four innocent people while driving drunk. The defense team argument the teen suffered from 'affluenza'. This strategy worked and the teen did not go to jail.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Dangerous Intersection
programme.desc: A report on the curious relationship and crazy coincidences that started with a chance traffic encounter, and ended with the killing of a beloved mother of four, Tammy Myers.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A woman's exclusive and emotional conversation with her adoptive father, Donald Robinson, who discusses his belief at the time that her adoption was legitimate and learning about his brother's horrific crimes.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A woman's exclusive and emotional conversation with her adoptive father, Donald Robinson, who discusses his belief at the time that her adoption was legitimate and learning about his brother's horrific crimes.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Before He Was King
programme.desc: Watch an investigation into the backstory of the self-proclaimed 'Tiger King.' Learn what sent Joe down a path of depravity and ultimately, conspiracy to commit murder. Every lead will be evaluated as we claw our way to the truth.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Team Tiger
programme.desc: Oklahoma wild animal zookeeper Joe Exotic fights to get out of prison and intensifies his feud with Carole Baskin, while the jury foreman exclusively explains the guilty verdict and an investigation reveals Carole's husband's will may be a forgery.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Into the Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: An ex-boyfriend believes Carole cares more about her animals than most people, while a former homicide cop explores property transfers from Carole to handyman Kenneth Farr and searches a lake for Don's body and a meat grinder.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Catch a Tiger by the Tail
programme.desc: Joe Exotic seeks a presidential pardon and keeps his spirits buoyed behind bars with the love of his husband and fan letters, as Don Lewis's handyman is confronted with allegations about his disappearance and Don's family seeks answers and closure.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Momma Made Me Help
programme.desc: When Shirley Furgala helped her mother, Betty Lou Beets, drag a dead body to the yard and bury it, she knew her own life might be in danger if she refused to help. What Shirley didn't know was this wouldn't be the last time her mother would ask for help.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bruce Reynolds
programme.desc: Bruce Reynolds was a career criminal who, looking for his defining moment, planned a daring train robbery in 1963. Reynolds secretly organised a gang of 15 men to bring down a Royal Mail train carrying over two million pounds in cash.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bruce Reynolds
programme.desc: Bruce Reynolds was a career criminal who, looking for his defining moment, planned a daring train robbery in 1963. Reynolds secretly organised a gang of 15 men to bring down a Royal Mail train carrying over two million pounds in cash.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon
programme.desc: Sitting on the shores of Moosehead Lake, the cabin known as the 'Call of The Loon' has been reacquired by the original builder's great-granddaughter. Chase and the team update the amenities and add a second story to accommodate the large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family
programme.desc: A couple found their own slice of heaven overlooking Lake Annabessacook, only to find out it needed more work than they could provide.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch
programme.desc: Brett opens up the floor plan of a 1950s mid-century ranch and makes the space more livable for a family of four while staying true to the original style.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fry Hard II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic fried chicken episode with an all-new deep-fried recipe, an introduction to sumac and a look at the science of crunch.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: I Pie: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown reloads this episode on lemon meringue pie with a new crust, a new filling and a new meringue. He also bites the heads off of some puppets.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces Vs. Liken
programme.desc: Chef Kelly Liken takes on the newest Iron Chef in her first entry to Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Zakarian Vs. Frauneder

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli Vs. Sutherland
programme.desc: Minnesota chef Justin Sutherland brings his contemporary Southern cuisine to Kitchen Stadium in an attempt to fleece Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Battle Oktoberfest

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Stein

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Brown

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Low Country Love
programme.desc: If you are looking for some Low Country Love in the form of a sweet treat, look no further than Charleston, South Carolina. At Callie's Hot Little Biscuit, they are baking up, over the top, warm doughy rounds like the Cinnamon Biscuit.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Start

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Pick Me Up
programme.desc: Tandem Coffee and Bakery in Portland, Maine will brighten your day with their coconut almond cream pie and their strawberry-almond cornmeal cake.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Maine Squeeze Sweets

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New York
programme.desc: We're in New York City for a tour of the town's best eats. From Velselka's borscht in the East Village to smoked herring on the Upper West Side.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: San Diego
programme.desc: San Diego may be the land of sun, surf and fun, but it's also home to some of the best dining spots around.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried Chicken

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tahiti
programme.desc: From a Polynesian twist on ceviche to freshwater shrimp coated in a sweet, coconut-curry sauce, Andrew sets sail on a culinary voyage through the signature dishes of Tahiti.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Nova Scotia
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores iconic dishes of picturesque Nova Scotia, Canada, which became a fishing hub after being settled by Europeans in the 16th century. The proximity to the sea -- it's never more than 42 miles away!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ocean City, Maryland
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Ocean City, Maryland, to dive into a massive jumbo lump crab cake sandwich, make some of the area's iconic salt water taffy candies and fight to stay afloat in the Titanic Sundae Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Shear Madness
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.desc: When treats go missing from the Puppy Playcare Halloween party, Bingo and Rolly set off on a mission to solve the mystery. When Bob leaves before he finishes raking, Bingo and Rolly set out to protect the leafy pile.

programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.desc: Disney music shorts to help children prepare for preschool.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Super Dupers

programme.title: The Thundermans: Revenge of the Smith

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Odd Jobs/ Movie Magic
programme.desc: Dad wishes he had a cooler job; Timmy enters a film festival to impress Trixie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Good Ol' Days/ Future Lost
programme.desc: Timmy gets babysat by Dad's dad; Timmy and Dad come upon Dad's favourite childhood book.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Many Unhappy Returns

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Todd Scouts/Goyles, Goyles, Goyles
programme.desc: The TMNT need to learn how to listen and get in touch with nature in order to save Todd after he’s captured by a group of hunters.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Flushed but Never Forgotten/ Lair Games

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family

programme.title: The Loud House: Intern for the Worse/ The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love

programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe's Untied/ Squid's Day Off
programme.desc: Pat doesn't know how to tie the laces on his new shoes; Mr. Krabs take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Patrick takes SpongeBob on as his role model; SpongeBob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dying for Pie/ Imitation Krabs
programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.desc: Raphael is worried about Casey's ability to handle big mutant threats when they meet Slash again and discover he has a partner of his own: The Newtralizer!

programme.desc: Tiger Claw returns and sets out to destroy the Ninja Turtles at any cost.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Pizza Face

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Legend of Kuro Kabuto

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Plan 10
programme.desc: Ralph's hot-headed impulsiveness lands him in deep trouble when he accidentally damages a machine that forces him to switch minds with a Kraang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Vengeance is Mine

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks

programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theo's Big Night Out/ The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Theodore tries to overcome his fear of sleep-overs by spending the night at Kevin's house without Alvin or Simon. When Alvin sees every celebrity with their own personal bodyguard, he decides to train Theodore for the job.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Open Wide and Say Aaahg
programme.desc: Timmy's tonsils are coming out and nurse Vicky is determined to make his visit unpleasant.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: You Doo/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Timmy gets his hands on 'YouDoo' dolls; Timmy wishes for all food on Earth to be desserts.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Boy Toy/ Inspection Detection
programme.desc: To have an adventure with his Crimson Chin action figure, Tommy wishes himself doll-sized.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crockin' the House/ Tardy Sauce
programme.desc: Mrs. Crocker leaves Mr. Crocker home alone for the first time, so he calls on Timmy to teach him how to have fun. Chloe wants to break the attendance record, but Timmy tells her school is canceled and drags her to a taco stand.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Knitwits/ Dimmsdale's Got Talent?
programme.desc: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it's really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Z's All That
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max get to act as a superhero mentor to one of their siblings, but quickly regret selecting Nora after seeing Billy's surprisingly impressive skillset.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Come What Mayhem
programme.desc: With one of his old pranks is set to ruin a superhero gathering, Max enlists Phoebe's help to stop it.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Significant Brother

programme.title: The Thundermans: Looperheroes

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Justice

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Jane and Maura must put aside their differences when they investigate the case of a college student who died in a tunnel. Meanwhile, Frankie Sr. returns with news that upsets Angela.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: This Is How a Heart Breaks
programme.desc: When Maura meets a new guy named Dennis in a very unusual way, he opens up a different side of her. Meanwhile, Jane is filled with mixed emotions after someone from her past returns.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Welcome to the Dollhouse
programme.desc: Young female professionals dressed as dolls are turning up dead on the public transit system and Jane and Maura must piece together the clues. Meanwhile, Angela implements new ideas for the café and Jane learns more about how Casey was injured.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Throwing Down the Gauntlet
programme.desc: Jane looks for a way for Maura to meet her biological mother, Dr. Hope Davis. Meanwhile, Angela gets involved in a political campaign and a nun from Jane and Frankie Jr.'s past returns.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money Maker
programme.desc: A rich financier is found stuffed in a trashcan wearing a cloak and mask. Meanwhile, Maura makes a deeper connection with her mother and half-sister who still don't know Maura is related to them.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Crazy for You
programme.desc: The detectives must piece together partial clues to lead them to the murderer of a husband-and-wife team of psychiatrists. Jane finds herself closer to the investigation than she realizes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings

programme.desc: Senior and the OCC guys auction off a military-themed bike to benefit families of fallen soldiers, and Junior designs a western-inspired motorcycle for country music star Clay Walker.

programme.title: American Chopper: Chopper up the Middle
programme.desc: Senior and Junior begin restoring a 1951 Buick, but don't always go by the book. Senior risks everything by moving designs away from their famous choppers. Junior challenges himself to build a streamlined bike for the MLB Network to impress his dad.

programme.desc: Junior designs a bike inspired by a futuristic big rig. The OCC team builds a military style bike with a sidecar to benefit a foundation for wounded veterans.

programme.title: American Chopper: Senior's Moment
programme.desc: Senior goes back to his roots and designs a throwback brand of affordable motorcycles to see from the OCC Showroom. Junior builds a bike using multiple aluminum parts.

programme.title: American Chopper: The Last Ride

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Bad Chad to the Bone
programme.desc: Chad gets pushed to his limits when a local body shop owner tasks him with his first-ever motorcycle build. With the Wharf Rat Bike Rally just two weeks away, Chad races the clock to visualize, customize and materialize the one-of-a-kind chopper.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Chad vs. Pinto
programme.desc: Chad takes on his most ambitious build yet: transforming a rusted-out 1971 Pinto into a European-style performance car framed in glass. With only four weeks to work and a mountain of problems facing him, Chad risks missing a deadline for the first time.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Performance Pinto
programme.desc: The team continues converting the rusted '71 Pinto into a European performance car despite the passed deadline. Unwilling to compromise on the original vision, Chad presses on both day and night to get his creation ready for its dramatic big city reveal.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Loud and Nasty
programme.desc: An old-time motorhead tasks Chad with building an open-wheel race car. On a limited budget, Chad decides to start with an antique engine and build the car around it but getting the engine running is a tricky task that may require a miracle to achieve.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Schooled by the Sauce
programme.desc: Two teachers get schooled by the fiery inferno of hot sauce, while a rapper and his manager sweat was they try to beat the heat.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No Sugar, Tons of Spice
programme.desc: Two teams duke it out against the catastrophic concoctions from Chef Willie.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: The guys advertise incompetence to a group of agency executives, are forced into dirty deeds as custodians in a mall food court and tempt their fates by returning to the wheel of doom.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Joker vs. Joker
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q face off in special Joker versus Joker challenges. They try their hands at giving palm readings, manicures, and much more in a humiliating quest to avoid facing the ultimate punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Just Made History
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Michael poses as a hipster at a farmers' market and makes an endless supply of juice. Then, things become blurry at the eye doctor, and later, shape-shifting aliens send Michael's co-worker into a frenzy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dangerously Drinkable
programme.desc: Michael astounds dental patients with molar radio transmissions, and while appraising art, he brings an extinct species back to life. Plus, an unusual brew stirs a ghostly hallucination that will make jaws drop.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Japanese Waterless Folding Toilet
programme.desc: Michael stretches headphone cords and reality with a mystical putty, stuns a co-worker with new bathroom technology, and in the big finale, a Porta Potty becomes a Portal Potty, leaving a construction worker amazed.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Albino Corn Snake Viper Patrol
programme.desc: Working at a tattoo parlor, Michael gets some killer ink in a flash. Later, a serpent ambushes a routine car checkup and one unlucky guy learns a lesson in shrinkage down on the docks.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 6
programme.desc: 20 real-life video clips of dopes driving dangerously for your amusement, including a thief in a hijacked backhoe, a trucker using Flintstone-style technology, and an Amish buggy driver who couldn't care less about the rules of the road.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Motorheads 7
programme.desc: A tipsy Mayor earning a DUI, some severe Australian road rage, and a snowmobile avalanche you won't believe.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 8
programme.desc: Twenty of the dumbest drivers to ever turn an ignition. There's a backwards biker, a superhero stopped for speeding, and an extreme case of Russian road rage.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 9
programme.desc: You'll see a passed out pilot, road rage rants, a nearly-too-hot-for-TV motorcycle ride, and a mail truck that delivers a hit. Keeping the show on the road is our celebrity cast.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Smushed

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: You're Cut Off

programme.title: The Kitchen: Heartwarming Harvest

programme.title: Chopped: Bacon, Burgers and Beer

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Clowns vs. Zombies

programme.desc: In Texas, Warden Boone is on a mission to arrest suspected armed robbers on the run. Warden Inman handles a group of hunters allegedly trespassing, and Warden Herchman and Stapleton track down a man after faking his own death.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hit the Ground Hunting

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Price of Freedom
programme.desc: Heimo's daughter Krin and family arrive in the refuge, but their cabin is uninhabitable.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Two Kills

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: No Regrets
programme.desc: The loss of Bob Harte is felt across the Refuge. Heimo boats to Bob's cabin to bring Bob's possessions to his family. Charlie recovers his father's shotgun from a hidden survival cache and hunts small game. Edna prepares her favorite meal, caribou head.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Hunter Is Hunted
programme.desc: As moose season opens, the hunt is on to get meat to sustain them through winter. As Charlie looks for a kill, he realizes he's being stalked by a bear. Heimo takes Krin to his best moose territory. Tyler takes to the skies to assess the fire damage.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Wrath
programme.desc: Tyler needs to hunt a moose to feed in family. Heimo and Scott race to get the boat off the freezing water. Bob's daughter and ex-wife return to his cab to honor his memory.

programme.desc: Heimo is desperate to get a moose for winter. Charlie and Tyler have to overcome fire damage on their traplines.

programme.title: Good Bones: Chelsea Vibes in Old Southside

programme.desc: Sarah must give tough news to a stressed-out client, and Bryan begins a surprise project for his parents.

programme.desc: A California couple who loves to travel are unpacking their bags in beautiful Playa del Carmen. They're looking for a place that's move-in ready with enough room for their daughter to visit, but they're willing to sacrifice space for the right location.

programme.title: Mexico Life: From Farming Pigs to Catching Waves in Puerto Morelos
programme.desc: After falling in love with the small fishing town of Puerto Morelos, a pig farming couple from Ohio wants a break from running the farm. They feel like the town's sleepy streets are a perfect fit.

programme.title: Mexico Life: A New Adventure in Cabo
programme.desc: Now that her two daughters are in college, this single mother from Arizona has decided to live a more adventurous lifestyle in Cabo San Lucas, Mexico. With the help of her daughters and real estate agent, she's hoping to find the perfect home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Different Opinions of the Perfect Home in Matagorda, Texas
programme.desc: A family has no doubt that Matagorda, Texas, is the perfect escape for a vacation home, but they can't seem to agree on the specific location. Dad wants a house on the river with easy fishing access while Mom would love to have the Gulf sands at her door.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Biking to a Bargain
programme.desc: A couple that moved to the Carolinas after they started dating have visited Hilton Head Island, SC, for years and love its beautiful beaches. With their kids getting older, they are finally ready to invest in a vacation home that's steps from the shore.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Making Sweet Music in San Carlos
programme.desc: A musical couple from Tempe, Arizona, is looking to relocate to San Carlos, Mexico. They don't need a lot of space and want something that's fully furnished and move-in ready, but she prefers a house while he's interested in a low-maintenance condo.

programme.title: Mexico Life: Never a Dull Moment in Playa Del Carmen
programme.desc: A California couple who loves to travel are unpacking their bags in beautiful Playa del Carmen. They're looking for a place that's move-in ready with enough room for their daughter to visit, but they're willing to sacrifice space for the right location.

programme.title: Mexico Life: From Farming Pigs to Catching Waves in Puerto Morelos

programme.title: Mexico Life: A New Adventure in Cabo

programme.title: Renovation Inc.: Raising the Stress Level

programme.title: Renovation Island: Set in Stone

programme.title: Renovation Island: Eye of the Storm

programme.title: Home Town: Banquette Dreams

programme.title: Home Town: Room to Grow
programme.desc: A couple with two kids are in desperate need of more space and hope to find a home with a big yard and studio for his work with an all-in budget of $200,000.

programme.title: Home Town: Sweet Home Laurel
programme.desc: A Laurel, MS, native is ready to plant roots in the place her family has called home for generations. With her all-in budget of $100,000, Erin and Ben create a beautiful transformation that includes a quaint home office and a master bedroom.

programme.title: Home Town: Moving to Main Street
programme.desc: A woman wants to downsize and move into town to be closer to friends and work. With her all-in budget of $125,000, she hopes to find a small home with a maintenance-free yard, a master bathroom, and space for her son.

programme.title: Home Town: Termite Terror

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Altman and Flagg's Co-List
programme.desc: Sworn enemies Altman and Flagg team up and hit the road in hopes of landing a major listing in La Jolla. Tracy gets creative to sell a Hollywood Hills artists enclave. James and David hit the hiking trails of LA to garner interest in a historic bungalow.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: James and David struggle with an unrealistic seller in order to move their Hollywood bungalow. Tracy makes a personal decision to list her own Brentwood home, but wants a huge number for it. Flagg and Altman launch their co-list with a black tie affair.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Rock and a Hard Price
programme.desc: Altman hosts a rocking open house for a Trousdale party pad that once belonged to Howard Hughes. Flagg struggles to find the perfect family house for a very particular buyer, who questions if Flagg is the right fit for her.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Altman Versus Fredrik
programme.desc: Altman hunts for his own flagship office space to create some distance from Fredrik Eklund, a former friend who is trying to make his mark on both coasts. Flagg tries to convince his hesitant seller to put in an offer or lose the home forever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: Tracy tries to balance her new portfolio with her demanding developer who has high expectations and a rocky past with Altman. James and David are up against the clock to find their nine months pregnant client her dream home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Ze Plane, Ze Plane!
programme.desc: Altman struggles to convince an unrealistic seller but risks losing the potential listing. Tracy tries to attract interest for a new construction with mid-century bones in Pasadena. Flagg goes all out with a plane for his new resort-style trophy listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Flagg it or Bag it
programme.desc: James and David host a backyard BBQ in Santa Monica, Altman goes after a new modern in Bird Streets, but is shocked when the sellers consider a low-ball offer. Flagg tries to find "Glee" star Becca Tobin her dream home in the historic Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: 24 Hours or Else
programme.desc: Altman races against the clock after being thrown a curveball by his Bird Streets sellers. James and David experience difficulties with their Santa Monica gem as the sellers have their own ideas about price, and who the buyers should be.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Swedish Invasion
programme.desc: James and David work with Zach Vella to list an architectural gem, but Fredrik's arrival in LA puts the pressure on to get it sold. Altman tries to find a modern above the Sunset Strip with space for all of his car enthusiast clients' toys.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Medieval Time Machine
programme.desc: Altman lists a castle in Beverly Ridge and leans in to Game of Thrones to get people through the door. Flagg finds himself opposite Fredrik, trying to negotiate a deal while getting a fair price for his client, while James and David are under pressure.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: One for the ‘Gram

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silence of the Lambo

programme.title: Pawn Stars: High Tops
programme.desc: A guy brings in the original AC motor built by Nikola Tesla. Rick and Corey check out a 1968 VW Bug convertible.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Apocalypse Wow
programme.desc: Check out an alleged original print by Renaissance artist Albrecht Durer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Stalled Deals
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee encounter a tennis racket signed by tennis legend Arthur Ashe. A 1918 Buick Touring Car journeys to the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rage Against That Machine
programme.desc: The guys check out a pair of rifles with double rotating barrels. Then, Corey and Chumlee check out a pair of cleats worn by Yankees legend Bucky Dent during his famous home run.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum-parazzi
programme.desc: The guys check out a poem written and signed by inventor Nikola Tesla. Then, a pair of wooly chaps ride into the shop. Later, Chumlee goes on a quest for a famous musician's autograph.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Enigma

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Road Test
programme.desc: A guitar that belonged to The Who's bassist strikes a chord with Rick. Then, Rick and Lili get the presidential treatment when a customer brings in a Richard Nixon paper dress. The guys decide it's time to put the Old Man's driving skills to the test.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Breaking the Bank
programme.desc: One of NBA legend Dr. J's supposed game-worn sneakers steps into the shop. Then, a rare half eagle coin from the Civil War shows up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Reeling and Dealing
programme.desc: A Ronco pocket fisherman comes into the shop. Then, Chumlee is thrown a curveball when a Babe Ruth signature glove steps up to the plate. Later, Rick wants to teach Corey and Chumlee the joys of going fishing.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Astro-Pawn
programme.desc: A Civil War general's sword, an 1800s veterinary medicine box, a pair of 1960s space toy robots, a 1936 Olympic pin.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn in Space
programme.desc: Explore the cosmos with the Pawn Stars when a cast signed helmet from the 1960s TV show 'Lost in Space' orbits the shop. Then, a strange, antique object surfaces and has Rick and Corey scratching their heads.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mad Deals

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawning Pistols

programme.title: Dateline: Footprint in the Dust
programme.desc: Susan Casey, a loving mother of four, vanishes just 20 steps from her apartment in a small Montana town. Police soon discover that three men in her life were on her street in the early morning hour when she disappeared.

programme.title: Dateline: Footprint in the Dust
programme.desc: Susan Casey, a loving mother of four, vanishes just 20 steps from her apartment in a small Montana town. Police soon discover that three men in her life were on her street in the early morning hour when she disappeared.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: The investigation of a drive-by shooting has the NCIS team searching Los Angeles for the dead marine's younger brother who may be the next target and the one with the answers.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Blood Drops
programme.desc: Grissom and the entire team investigate when a teenager and her sister are the sole survivors of the gruesome murder of four members of one family in a quiet suburban neighbourhood. What initially looks like a cult murder becomes more disturbing.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Hand-to-Hand
programme.desc: When an undercover operation has the NCIS team investigating a MMA gym and its fighters, Sam Hanna is tasked with donning gloves and entering the cage for a one-on-one fight.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Found

programme.desc: Despite being extremely ill, Christy insists on taking her final exams. Also, Bonnie is furious when she suspects her boyfriend is cheating on her.

programme.title: Mom: Pure Evil and a Free Piece of Cheesecake
programme.desc: When Christy learns she made the Dean's List at school, she is disappointed by Bonnie's lackluster response.

programme.title: Mom: Mahjong Sally and the Ecstasy
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie don't know who to believe when they hear conflicting stories about Violet and Gregory's break-up.

programme.title: Black-ish: Plus Two Isn't a Thing
programme.desc: Dre's childhood best friend Gigi Franklin is in town, and Bow feels like an afterthought whenever the two of them are together. Dre and Gigi are like brother and sister, but it doesn’t help that Gigi is an international pop star with model looks.

programme.title: Black-ish: Old Digger
programme.desc: Dre has never had a problem with Pops dating, but when it comes to Ruby, he won't let anyone come between them. When Ruby invites Dre and Bow to meet the new man in her life, Dre immediately goes on the defensive and finds any reason to dislike him.

programme.title: Black-ish: Keeping Up With the Johnsons
programme.desc: After a month of heavy spending, Dre and Bow start to question if they are living too large and try to become more financially responsible.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: After Dre notices that his neighbour Janine has never invited his family to any of her pool parties, he assumes she is racially stereotyping them as a family that doesn't swim. The kids are shocked to find out that, in fact, Dre doesn’t know how to swim.

programme.title: Movie: The Snowman
programme.desc: Two detectives, a grizzled veteran and a brilliant recruit, hunt for a suspected serial killer who always kills the women on the first snowfall of the season, and who always leaves a snowman not far from the spot where he committed the crime.

programme.title: Movie: Buried
programme.desc: A man wakes up to find that he is buried alive inside a coffin with only a lighter, a cell phone and a small amount of air. The race is on as he frantically makes calls for help.

programme.title: Movie: Superfly
programme.desc: A drug dealer who has it all finds his world crumbling around him when a new gang with cartel connections moves in on his turf. He decides to retire, but not before pulling off his biggest job ever -- robbing the very cartel that's driving him out.

programme.title: Movie: Scarface
programme.desc: A Cuban refugee makes his way to the top of the Florida drug trade. Money and power make him feel like he's living the American dream. Despite his success, his position is tenuous and he is constantly watching those around him for treachery.

programme.desc: The ins and outs of how time-delay locks, brownies, pallet dispensers, and crystal chandeliers are made.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Lost Queen
programme.desc: Archaeologists use modern-day science and the latest technology to unlock the mystery of ancient Egypt's wealthiest and most iconic pharaoh queen in the search for her tomb and body to reveal the shocking truth of how she perished.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Genius of Nikola Tesla
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla was one of the most enigmatic, but least known, scientists of the last century. He was an early pioneer of both electricity and radio, and created one of the first electrical motors. He died in poverty and under suspicion by the FBI.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Alchemists
programme.desc: Nostradamus, Nicolas Flamel and John Dee were alchemists that had a profound effect on the world. Find out if they were clever deceivers or if they really could perform miracles.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Nazi Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: As the Nazi war machine tore through Europe, they plundered museums in search of holy relics that would grant them untold power and prestige. experts investigate how close Hitler was to discovering the Holy Grail and its promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Legend of the Turin Shroud
programme.desc: The Turin Shroud is believed to be the burial cloth of Jesus and proof of his existence, but skeptics disagree. Experts investigate this ancient relic to determine if the shroud is genuine, or one of the most elaborate hoaxes in history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Curse of the Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: Mysterious crystal skulls could be long-lost relics of Aztec and Maya civilizations that grant supernatural powers, according to some; experts investigate new leads to reveal if these strange objects are genuine artifacts or if they're modern-day fakes.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Salem Witches
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Momma Made Me Help
programme.desc: When Shirley Furgala helped her mother, Betty Lou Beets, drag a dead body to the yard and bury it, she knew her own life might be in danger if she refused to help. What Shirley didn't know was this wouldn't be the last time her mother would ask for help.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Don't Believe in Forgiveness
programme.desc: Teri Knight spent weeks driving cross-country, desperately searching for the secret her ex-husband, Manuel Gehring, took to his grave. It took years before a stranger finally solved the mystery that haunted Teri ever since learning Manuel died in prison.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Under His Thumb
programme.desc: Jamie Clark had already been twice unlucky in love, so when she met Anthony Lord she thought the third time would be the charm. But by the time she realized what perverted plans he had for her, she was already trapped.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: It Was All Judith
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. Tormented by guilt, he kept her deadly secret for years. Knowing what she was capable of, he wasn't sure he could tell the truth and live.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Prom Night Killer
programme.desc: Jessi Toronjo went to a sleepover in 1989 thinking her stepbrother, Jeffrey Pelley, was at his senior prom. She spent the next 13 years believing someone else committed the unspeakable crime of that weekend, only to discover she knew the killer all along.

programme.desc: A young girl disappears after school. Her last known steps are caught on surveillance cameras, which led investigators to two dark minds who carried out one of the most sinister, depraved crimes imaginable.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alice Swanson was always envious of the perfect life her childhood neighbor, William Jennings Choyce, and his family seemed to have. But after she married him, she slowly realized that nothing under the surface was as perfect as it seemed.

programme.desc: Cathy thought she had found the man of her dreams in Peter Tobin. But by the time she discovered his dark secret, it was too late. How would she keep herself and her son alive long enough to escape one of the most evil men in modern history?

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: River of Sorrow
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is savagely murdered while fishing along the Platte River.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Little Lamb
programme.desc: Investigators must identify a gunman who murdered a young mother but spared her child asleep in her car seat in the back of her minivan.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Rumors Lies and Murder
programme.desc: Two sisters are found murdered in a heart-breaking double homicide. The evidence police discover paint a grim picture of the crime.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Gone in an Instant
programme.desc: As beautiful young women continue to disappear out of their Kansas City area apartments, police piece together evidence that the terrifying crimes are all connected.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Classified Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating a couple's mysterious disappearance uncover a trail of terrifying clues.

programme.title: Disappeared: Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: College student Bryce Laspisa is driving to visit his parents, but something mysterious is troubling him. When his car is found crashed and abandoned in a remote California park, investigators and his family try to make sense of Bryce's baffling behavior.

programme.title: Disappeared: Into the Night
programme.desc: After a night at home watching movies, 18-year-old Zoe Campos cannot be found by her family the next morning. As investigators pore through the teen's Facebook account, they discover she did not turn in early as her loved ones originally thought.

programme.title: Disappeared: Flight Risk
programme.desc: On route to the airport, nineteen-year-old Katelin Akens makes an unexpected stop at a Virginia shopping mall...and vanishes. Police investigate her loved ones at length and start to suspect that someone close to Katelin may know more than they're saying.

programme.title: Disappeared: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: While on a Caribbean cruise, 23-year old Amy Bradley vanishes from her family's cabin and is never seen again. Over a decades-long struggle, her family embarks on countless grueling searches, stopping at nothing, they say, to find their beloved Amy.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Revenge With a Bullet
programme.desc: After motorists spot a man's body burning on the side of the highway, investigators find evidence of a brutal assassination and fiery cover-up. Detectives decode construction debris with curious details to reveal a scheme that ended in murder.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Prowling Wolf
programme.desc: Reports of shots fired at an apartment complex lead police to a horrific discovery: the bodies of a single mother and two of her children. Detectives find answers in shell casings, shoe impressions, and DNA to stop a diabolical predator.

programme.title: Murder Decoded: Footsteps in Blood
programme.desc: A man calls 911 when he finds blood inside a friend's home. Officers enter to find a beloved community activist shot dead. Detectives piece together clues bloody footprints, bullet fragments, a credit card trail to find a cold-blooded murderer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Monster in the Desert
programme.desc: In 1992, a 19-year-old woman is brutally assaulted outside of Desert Hot Springs, California. Miraculously she escapes, but lives in constant fear that he will find her again one day. What the victim doesn't realize is she survived a serial killer.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. Two men carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: The story of how an unremarkable drifter from Vienna instigated the most devastating military conflict in the history of the world. Explore how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler he was a modern-day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870s, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka and Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver and Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends – but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Yellow Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley falls in love with an old Victorian that still has most of its original details.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: American Muscle
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders create a timber frame barn for a private collection of American muscle cars in Columbus, Texas. Mark visits one of the biggest barns he's ever seen, finds the oldest live oak tree in the state and explores some local history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Antique barns and cabins are salvaged and the wood reused for stunning modern homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hillbilly Lemonade
programme.desc: The guys must get creative to make something worthwhile from a lackluster cabin. Later, Mark visits an incredible finished cabin made from logs he salvaged on the first season of the show.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Cottage
programme.desc: The guys turn a brand new storage shed into an 1800s log cabin, then drive it to Round Top, Texas. Mark gets a lesson from a local silversmith, and the team visits historic structures built around the state by 19th-century pioneers.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: American Muscle
