programme.desc: Cat Boy enlists Munkigu to go aboard the Flying Factory to distract Romeo. Kevin doesn’t think he’ll ever be top dog; he's not wolfy enough to find the legendary bone.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Donald's Fast Food 500/ Mini-Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends plan to surprise Donald with a waffle breakfast for his birthday. Minnie's nieces, Millie and Melody, visit the Happy Helpers office for the day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Case of the Wrecked Recital / The Case of the Vanishing Vessels
programme.desc: When Prince Neel's sitar goes missing, Mira must track it down before great aunt Rupa finds out. Then, Mira goes on a mysterious underground adventure to find toy boats for a race.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Temple of the Tiger/ The Gift-Mazing Birthday
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: 221B Barker Street / Leaf It to Puppies
programme.desc: When treats go missing from the Puppy Playcare Halloween party, Bingo and Rolly set off on a mission to solve the mystery. When Bob leaves before he finishes raking, Bingo and Rolly set out to protect the leafy pile.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pit Stop and Go!/ Alarm on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's the first 'Pit Stop and Go Rally' where pit crews compete against each other. The Happy Helpers look after Clara Cluck's farm while she's out of town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Abra-ka-Goof!/ Happy Birthday Helpers!
programme.desc: Goofy thinks he's used his magician skills to turn Gordon Gear into a rabbit. Later, the Happy Helpers go on a wild ride as they chase down a wagon carrying a birthday cake.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: One Small Ruff for Pup-kind / The Lost Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: The pups head to Space Camp to give a dog toy to Chloe; The pups get help to find their bouncy ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Mini-Golfin' Guard Pups / Summer Splash Bash
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Asteroid Accident / All About Asteroids
programme.desc: Owlette causes an asteroid accident. While trying to make it right, the PJ Masks meet another night-time hero, Newton! Newton likes the PJ Masks, but also likes his solitude.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Armadylan and Robette Rule/ Armadylan Zen
programme.desc: Armadylan and sidekick, Robette, fight with Romeo to determine whose sidekick is better. After Armadylan loses his temper again, the PJ Masks take him on a zen trip.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Slumber Paw-ty
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Thinking Cap
programme.desc: When Clarabelle Cow plans a fun scavenger hunt for the Clubhouse pals, Professor Von Drake lets Goofy borrow his new invention to help everyone figure out the clues.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Donald's Roadster Round-Up / The Daisy Dance!
programme.desc: On a trip to the convenience store, Donald and Pluto lose all the roadsters; The Happy Helpers take over Clarabelle's dance class.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super Goof's Super Puzzle
programme.desc: In order to help his friends solve a puzzle, Goofy uses his alter-ego 'Super Goof'.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Farm Fun-Fair!
programme.desc: Everyone wins a Blue Ribbon for participating in Mickey's Farm Fun-Fair.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Best
programme.desc: By playing a variety of games, Pluto and Butch, Pete's dog competing for a trophy.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald the Genie
programme.desc: Donald becomes a genuine magical genie and realizes it is not as easy as it sounds when he is only able to grant one wish to each Clubhouse friend.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Monster Musical
programme.desc: Mickey Mouse and his friends teach important skills through their adventures.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Surprise
programme.desc: Mickey presents his Fun Puzzles.

programme.title: Chuggington: Frostini's True Calling / Chug Patrol, Out of Control
programme.desc: Young rookie trains learn how to help themselves and the people of their town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Ducks
programme.desc: Donald volunteers to help a group of ducks get to a warm beach for their winter retreat.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Because Triceratops!/ Rock Out
programme.desc: Tiny performs a triceratops rite of passage! Rocky sets out to prove that he's the ultimate tough guy, like Giganto, but discovers that everyone needs help sometimes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library!/ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Return to the Pumpkin Patch/ Haunted Howl-oween
programme.desc: After Bingo loses his collar at a pumpkin patch, he, Rolly and Hissy return to find it. When a neighborhood kid can't trick-or-treat because she's lost her costume, Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to track it down.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Kirby and the King/ Bubble Monkey, Blow Your Nose!
programme.desc: When Lambie sports her new sparkly sunglasses and Sir Kirby admires them, the Wicked King thinks that they must have special powers, so he must have them.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Spoon in the Stone/ Gonzonocchio

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Terrifying Tri-State Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: In the first tale, Buford breaks a rule that turns Perry into an evil facsimile. Tale two tells of Doofenshmirtz’s encounter with a floating baby head that grants cursed wishes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: That's the Spirit!/ The Curse of Candace
programme.desc: It's Halloween night and the kids encounter a strange boy and his father who are convinced their house is haunted. Then, Candace is bitten by a bat after watching a popular vampire movie and worries that she is becoming a vampire.

programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.desc: George creates the perfect spot for a nap under his desk at work. Kramer begins swimming in the East River. Elaine's boyfriend sends her a new mattress that she can't seem to get rid of. Jerry hires a contractor, who decides to re-do the kitchen.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Yada Yada
programme.desc: George's new girlfriend, Marcy, uses the phrase 'yada, yada, yada' in place of bad news.

programme.title: Mom: Cornbread and a Cashmere Onesie

programme.title: Mom: Freckled Bananas and a Little Schwinn
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie dip back into illegal activities, and Adam questions their morality.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Hold-Up
programme.desc: Max and Caroline show their true colours when the diner gets robbed. Meanwhile, everyone sees a surprising new side of Han.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Cupcake War
programme.desc: Max and Caroline attempt to take their cupcake business to the big leagues when they audition to be contestants on 'Cupcake Wars.'

programme.title: Major Crimes: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: There is a miscarriage of justice when a gang banger is acquitted of murder and released from custody. Sharon's ex-husband, Jack Raydor represents the suspect in a subsequent murder. Rusty takes a chance when the guy he has a crush on visits.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Goes to the Asylum
programme.desc: Adrian Monk lands in a mental hospital where Santa Claus may hold the key to a murder.

programme.desc: Segment features John David Washington, Angelina Jolie, Ken Marino, Jayma Mays, Jamie Foxx, Paula Pell, Tina Kim, Talitha Bateman, Jerry O’connell, Octavia Spencer and Black Eyed Peas.

programme.desc: A woman claims she was unfairly stripped of a pageant title and scholarship; a prized guitar is smashed during a concert.

programme.desc: A Milwaukee, WI woman unsure which of two men is her father, believes it is the one who is short like she is.

programme.desc: A Mims, FL man doesn’t believe he is the father of his ex’s daughter because she got pregnant too fast.

programme.title: Judge Jerry

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman claims her relationship with her ex-boyfriend, who is 18 years older, went downhill because he constantly accused her of cheating. She’s suing him for two loans and unreturned property. Her ex claims she destroyed his property.

programme.desc: Sam must make his family, as well as the townspeople, accept his Japanese wife in 1952.

programme.title: Quantum Leap: Blind Faith
programme.desc: Sam becomes a blind pianist who must save his assistant Michele from being murdered.
